change: Durable whole-transcript integrity and fail-closed intelligence hydration
reliabilityChanges: Completed text transcripts persist explicit outcome, UTF-16 character count, UTF-8 byte count, and a versioned whole-body FNV-1a 64-bit integrity fingerprint.
Startup, search, Ask, semantic indexing, summary, backup, Markdown/PDF/share, GitHub, Calendar, and Email reject missing, shortened, or same-length altered archived text before use.
No-speech is an explicit verified empty outcome; ambiguous missing text is visible and recreatable from retained audio rather than silently exported as silence.
Legacy non-empty archives gain integrity metadata on hydration, and backup-recovered text is written and read back exactly before compact metadata may omit it.
Release diagnostics assert completed transcript-integrity metadata without exporting checksum values or meeting content.

focusedCoverage: exact archive round-trip with retained integrity metadata
explicit no-speech acceptance and ambiguous-empty rejection
content-free reliability assertion and diagnostics metadata

ios.knownHostGate: Xcode 26.3 cannot mount the developer disk image for the paired iOS 26.5.2 iPhone.

qualificationBoundary: Build, unit, and rendered browser integrity proof do not prove locked physical 60/120-minute capture, native saved-audio transcription, interruption or memory-pressure delivery during mobile suspension, or destination-app receipt.
